main.description: The authority record defining the rules for a Starrysky verified streak.

name.description: Human-readable name for this streak (e.g., 'Daily Coding').

originService.description: Optional: The NSID of the service being tracked for automated check-ins (e.g., app.bsky.feed.post).

verificationType.description: Whether this streak requires a third-party cryptographic signature.

allowedWitnesses.description: An array of DIDs authorized to sign attestations for this policy. Required if witnessed.

allowedGranters.description: An array of DIDs authorized to grant extra streak freezes to the user.

type.description: The time window during which the required check-ins must occur.

requiredCheckinsPerInterval.description: Number of check-ins required within the interval to maintain the streak.

intervalResetDay.description: For weekly: 0-6 (Sun-Sat). For monthly: 1-31. Defines when the window rolls over.

intervalsToEarnFreeze.description: Number of successful intervals required to earn 1 freeze.

maxFreezes.description: The maximum number of freezes a user can bank at one time.

includeFreezesInStreak.description: If true, frozen intervals are included in the streak sequence count.

milestones.description: Explicit streak counts that trigger a celebration or reward.

recurringMilestoneInterval.description: Interval for repeating milestones (e.g., every 100 days) after explicit milestones are passed.

freezesGrantedAtMilestone.description: Number of freezes to grant when reaching a milestone (explicit or recurring).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this policy record was created.
